mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post(thread_id, user_id, floor_no, content, status, created_at) VALUES(#{threadId}, #{userId}, #{floorNo}, #{content}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_post WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.thread_id = #{threadId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.floor_no ASC

SELECT p.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.thread_id = #{threadId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.floor_no ASC
SELECT MAX(floor_no) FROM forum_post WHERE thread_id = #{threadId}

SELECT p.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.thread_id = #{threadId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.floor_no ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT p.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.thread_id = #{threadId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.floor_no ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE thread_id = #{threadId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar, t.title as threadTitle, t.id as threadId FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_thread t ON p.thread_id = t.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND t.status = 1 AND p.floor_no > 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT p.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar, t.title as threadTitle, t.id as threadId FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_thread t ON p.thread_id = t.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND t.status = 1 AND p.floor_no > 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post p INNER JOIN forum_thread t ON p.thread_id = t.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND t.status = 1 AND p.floor_no > 1
